description: A graphic built over a photograph of a hillside residential neighborhood of single-family houses (Victorian and craftsman-style homes in muted greens, yellows, grays and reds) overlooking a body of water, with a strip of green grass in the foreground. At the top center is the White House wordmark: a small engraving of the White House building above the text 'The WHITE HOUSE' in a serif font. Across the lower third is a white rounded rectangle in the style of a news clipping containing a black highlight box with 'Bloomberg' in white, and below it a bold black headline: 'US Housing Starts Surge to Highest Level Since December 2024,' with the phrase 'Highest Level Since December 2024' marked in a yellow highlight. The tweet text reads 'WE'RE BUILDING AGAIN' with a U.S. flag emoji.
notable_text: The WHITE HOUSE | Bloomberg | US Housing Starts Surge to Highest Level Since December 2024
